libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, external WebDAV server, environment variable, or system property is indicated. Prefer in-memory tests of headers, XML/properties, reports, methods, locator factories, and servlet-facing adapters using mocks/proxies or lightweight stubs for request/response objects rather than starting a container.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8851 [Automation] native-image run fails for org.apache.jackrabbit:jackrabbit-webdav:2.0-beta4; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Because the servlet API is provided rather than transitive, scaffold-only dependency resolution may compile only non-servlet tests and miss a major part of normal server-side usage.

The existing native-image run failure appears to be in pure locator behavior, so the servlet dependency is setup for coverage reachability, not necessarily the direct fix for the reported native runtime assertion failures.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: jackrabbit-webdav exposes and implements servlet-facing WebDAV server APIs, while its Maven POM marks javax.servlet:servlet-api as a provided dependency, so generated tests need that API on the test compile/runtime classpath to reach meaningful servlet/request/response coverage.
